mapper.sql: id, handover_by, receive_by, handover_time, remark, create_by, create_by_name, create_time
mapper.select: select count(*) from handover where handover_by = #{empId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert: insert into handover (handover_by, receive_by, handover_time, remark, create_by, create_by_name, create_time, item_names) values (#{handoverBy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{receiveBy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{handoverTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{itemNames,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into handover
handover_by,
receive_by,
handover_time,
remark,
create_by,
create_by_name,
create_time,
item_names,
#{handoverBy,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{receiveBy,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{handoverTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createBy,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{itemNames,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update handover
handover_by = #{handoverBy,jdbcType=INTEGER},
receive_by = #{receiveBy,jdbcType=INTEGER},
handover_time = #{handoverTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_by_name = #{createByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
item_names = #{itemNames,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update handover set handover_by = #{handoverBy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, receive_by = #{receiveBy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, handover_time = #{handoverTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_by_name = #{createByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, item_names = #{itemNames,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update handover set handover_by = #{handoverBy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, receive_by = #{receiveBy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, handover_time = #{handoverTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_by_name = #{createByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
